mapper.select: with temp as ( select hted.*, hte.name as 'htName',hte.dept_id,hsc.name as 'name',hsc.initial_ZB 'initialZB', ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hte.update_time DESC) AS RowNum from hlvr_training_exam_detail hted left join hlvr_training_exam hte on hted.ht_id = hte.id join hlvr_sop_card hsc on hsc.id = hted.hsc_id and hsc.del_flag=0 where hted.del_flag = 0 and hte.del_flag = 0 and hte.dept_id = #{deptId} and hte.`type` =#{type} ) SELECT * FROM temp WHERE RowNum BETWEEN ((#{current} -1) * #{size} + 1 ) AND (#{current} * #{size}) order by temp.create_time desc

with temp as ( select hted.*, hte.name as 'htName',hte.dept_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hte.update_time DESC) AS RowNum from hlvr_training_exam_detail hted left join hlvr_training_exam hte on hted.ht_id = hte.id join hlvr_sop_card hsc on hsc.id = hted.hsc_id and hsc.del_flag=0 where hted.del_flag = 0 and hte.del_flag = 0 and hte.dept_id = #{deptId} and hte.`type` =#{type} ), already as ( select hted_id, create_time < NOW() - INTERVAL 30 minute as 'complete' from hlvr_te_batch htb where create_by = #{userId} ) SELECT *, case when a.complete is null then '未开始' else '进行中' end as 'status' FROM temp t left join already a on t.id = a.hted_id WHERE (a.complete != 1 or a.complete is null) and RowNum BETWEEN ((#{current} -1) * #{size} + 1 ) AND (#{current} * #{size}) order by t.create_time desc

with temp as ( select hted.*, hte.name as 'htName',hte.dept_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hte.update_time DESC) AS RowNum from hlvr_training_exam_detail hted left join hlvr_training_exam hte on hted.ht_id = hte.id join hlvr_sop_card hsc on hsc.id = hted.hsc_id and hsc.del_flag=0 where hted.del_flag = 0 and hte.del_flag = 0 and hte.dept_id = #{deptId} and hte.`type` =#{type} ), already as ( select hted_id, create_time < NOW() - INTERVAL 30 minute as 'status' from hlvr_te_batch htb where create_by = #{userId} ) SELECT COUNT(*) from temp t left join already a on t.id = a.hted_id WHERE a.status != 1 or a.status is null
